ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-5) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft (e.g., 1st pick) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number worn by the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2018-2019) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for in the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started in the season */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game in the season */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rapm" (
  "player_rapm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player RAPM record */,
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-season record */,
  "rapm_off" REAL /* RAPM for offensive performance */,
  "rapm_def" REAL /* RAPM for defensive performance */,
  "rapm" REAL /* Overall RAPM */,
  "rapm_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in overall RAPM */,
  "rapm_off_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in offensive RAPM */,
  "rapm_def_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in defensive RAPM */,
  "rapm_intercept" REAL /* RAPM intercept */,
  "adjusted_plus_minus" REAL /* Adjusted plus/minus rating */,
  "offensive_plus_minus" REAL /* Offensive plus/minus rating */,
  "defensive_plus_minus" REAL /* Defensive plus/minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_rapm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rapm_player_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_season_id") REFERENCES player_seasons ("player_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_advanced_stats" (
  "player_advanced_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player advanced stats record */,
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-season record */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "three_point_attempts" REAL /* Three-point field goal attempts per game */,
  "free_throw_attempts" REAL /* Free throw attempts per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game */,
  "box_plus_minus" REAL /* Box plus/minus rating */,
  "value_over_replacement_player" REAL /* Value over replacement player (VORP) rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_advanced_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_advanced_stats_player_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_season_id") REFERENCES player_seasons ("player_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., Sprain, Fracture) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2018-2019) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Base salary for the season */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus for the season */,
  "cap_hit" REAL /* Cap hit for the player's salary */,
  "luxury_tax" REAL /* Luxury tax paid by the team for the player's salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Guaranteed, Non-Guaranteed) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "non_guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Non-guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  "award_year" TEXT /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Trade, Waiver) */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team rank record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2018-2019) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage for the season */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in their conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in their division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ranks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_advanced_stats" (
  "team_advanced_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team advanced stats record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2018-2019) */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating of the team */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating of the team */,
  "net_rating" REAL /* Net rating of the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the team (possessions per 48 minutes) */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage of the team */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage of the team */,
  "three_point_attempts" REAL /* Three-point field goal attempts per game */,
  "free_throw_attempts" REAL /* Free throw attempts per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game */,
  "true_shooting_percentage_allowed" REAL /* True shooting percentage allowed by the team's defense */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage_allowed" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage allowed by the team's defense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_advanced_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_advanced_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
